seo.title: Healthcare Assistants | HCA Staffing Agency London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Fully vetted, NVQ-qualified Healthcare Assistants for care homes, nursing homes, and supported living across London. Emergency, temporary, and long-term placements.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Healthcare Assistants
fields.sub: Healthcare Assistants are the backbone of quality patient care

fields.heading: Why Choose Our Healthcare Assistants UK?
fields.body: Trained in personal care, moving and handling, and infection control Fully DBS-checked and compliance-ready Available for emergency, temporary, or long-term placements Experience with elderly care, dementia, physical disability, and palliative care Compassionate, professional, and adaptable in all care settings

items.title: Personal Care Support
items.body: Assisting with washing, dressing, toileting, and mobility

items.title: Emotional & Companionship Care
items.body: Providing conversation, reassurance, and social engagement

fields.heading: Who we Work With
fields.body: Residential and Nursing Homes Supported Living Services Mental Health Units Learning Disability Services Local Authorities and Private Providers

items.q: Are your healthcare assistants trained and CQC compliant?
items.a: Yes. All our HCAs receive mandatory training in care standards, safeguarding, infection control, and manual handling and adhere to CQC staffing requirements

items.q: Can I hire healthcare assistants on a temporary basis?
items.a: Absolutely. We provide flexible HCA for hire solutions—short-term, long-term, or ad-hoc placements.

items.q: Do you offer same-day staffing for urgent shifts?
items.a: Yes. Depending on availability, we can supply same-day or next-day cover

items.q: Do you supply HCAs to supported living environments?
items.a: Yes. Our healthcare assistants are trained to support adults with a wide range of care needs in supported living settings.

fields.heading: Request Staff Now!
fields.sub: We specialise in Healthcare Assistants UK staffing that meets the demands of busy care providers while ensuring residents receive consistent and quality care.
